features.name: fscanf EOF return value
features.description: Code should include $fscanf on a file at EOF followed by comparison with -1 for EOF detection, where Verilator incorrectly returns 0 instead of -1

features.name: file I/O with string and integer formats
features.description: Code should include $fopen with read mode followed by $fscanf using %s and %d format specifiers to read from a file

features.name: unpacked reg array as string buffer
features.description: Code should include a 64-bit unpacked reg array (8*8:1) used as a string buffer with $fscanf
